case_title: ZHANG, XUE GUANG vs. LEIPZIER, RANDALL J. et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR CERTIFICATE OF EXCEPTION GRANTED - 4 - DESMOND - IT IS ORDERED THAT SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS & COMPLT. ON DEFT. RANDALL LEIPZIER MAY BE EXTENDED UP UNTIL 2-30-94. STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUE TO 4-20-94. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, XUE GUANG

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, XUE GUANG AS TO DEFENDANT LEIPZIER, RANDALL J. DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-24-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-23-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-04-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-24-1994, CONTINUED TO APR-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PER COURT ORDER OF 11/30/93. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
